/** * Copyright (c) Meta Platforms, Inc. and affiliates. * * This source code is licensed under the MIT license found in the * LICENSE file in the root directory of this source tree. * * @flow strict * @format */ import type {HermesNode} from './HermesAST'; import type HermesParserDeserializer from './HermesParserDeserializer'; declare module.exports: $ReadOnlyArray< (this: HermesParserDeserializer) => HermesNode, >;
